name: Pecan Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
CRUST:
In a large mixing bowl, blend together flour, sugar, butter and salt until
the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Press firmly and evenly into a greased 15x10x1 inch baking pan. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Meanwhile, in another bowl, combine eggs, syrup, sugar, butter and vanilla. Stir in pecans. Spread evenly over hot crust.
Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until set. Cool on a wire rack.
